content_hints.description: Downtown -- the drowned city. Neon bleeds through perpetual rain, reflecting off streets slick with runoff and spilled synth-coolant. Megacorp logos project from tower faces a hundred stories up, their light never reaching the street-level vendors hawking bootleg firmware and organ-printer cartridges. Down here, everyone is selling something.

npcs.name: Street Corner AI (Advert Unit)
npcs.dialogue: Welcome to NeoArc. Current threat level: AMBER. Recommended actions: stay indoors, update your firewall, avoid eye contact with anyone carrying exposed chrome. Have a productive day.

event_triggers: On entry: A delivery drone crashes into a puddle at your feet, sparking. Its cargo -- a sealed medical canister -- rolls toward a storm drain. Someone will want that back.

content_hints.description: The Corpo Zone begins where the rain stops -- climate-controlled airspace maintained by Helix Industries atmospheric drones. The architecture transitions from street-level concrete to chrome-and-glass towers connected by skywalks. Security cameras track every movement. Your biometrics were logged the moment you crossed the perimeter.

npcs.name: Corporate Security AI
npcs.dialogue: Biometric scan complete. Citizen status: UNREGISTERED. You have fourteen minutes to present valid corporate credentials or vacate the zone. Timer begins now.

event_triggers: On entry: Your neural interface pings with three corporate job offers and a cease-and-desist order, all within the first ten seconds

content_hints.description: Helix Tower -- corporate headquarters, one hundred and forty stories of reinforced smart-glass and drone-patrolled airspace. The lobby alone has more security than most districts. Above floor sixty, the building enters the corporate intranet -- a closed network running proprietary ICE that has killed three netrunners this quarter. The target is on floor one-twelve.
event_triggers: On entry: Your interface detects seventeen active scan attempts in the first corridor. Helix does not trust its own employees, let alone intruders.

content_hints.description: Cyberspace -- the Grid. Not a place you walk to, but a place you fall into when the neural link takes hold. Here, data has geography. Firewalls are walls. ICE is ice -- cold, sharp, and lethal. The Grid renders as an infinite cityscape of light and mathematics, where the laws of physics are replaced by the laws of code.
event_triggers: On entry: Your avatar materializes in the Grid. The data around you flows like traffic -- packets of light streaming between server nodes. Something large and dark moves in the deep code. It noticed you.
